name: dslforge
description: DSL authoring workflow assistant for Visual Studio Code, starting with Langium.

dslforge.validation.command.markdownDescription: Workspace validation command used first by `DSLForge: Validate Current Grammar`. If empty, DSLForge auto-detects a supported `package.json` script.

dslforge.validation.maxCapturedOutputCha.markdownDescription: Maximum number of output characters DSLForge keeps in memory while validation is running. Additional output is still streamed to the Output panel but is not retained for diagnostics parsing.

dslforge.ai.maxContextFiles.markdownDescription: Maximum number of selected context files DSLForge sends to AI-backed commands such as `Explain Current Grammar`, `Create DSL Scaffold`, and `Generate Sample DSL`.

dslforge.ai.maxCharactersPerFile.markdownDescription: Maximum number of characters DSLForge includes from any single context file for AI-backed commands.

dslforge.ai.maxContextCharacters.markdownDescription: Maximum total number of context characters DSLForge sends to AI-backed commands across all selected files.

scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/test/diagnosticsFixtureRunner.js && node dist/test/projectFixtureRunner.js
